TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Adama_Barrow, title = Adama_Barrow, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Adama_Barrow} }

S.FORM: I 1965 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci Adama Barrow , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Gambia anini i ci Adama Barrow, patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 19 a romi'ad. Kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i a…¨~…ģama b~b~varro~uw , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u *amb~b~via anini i ¶i a…¨~…ģama b~b~varro~uw, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. kaso~ufo~u ¶an a …ĺo~uma ° **** …ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ ** sa…ĺikaka **** nataja…ĺan ** pito~uo~uran **
S.FORM: I 1965 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci Adama Barrow , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Gambia anini i ci Adama Barrow, patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 19 a romi'ad. Kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô
